name: Winter Garrison ~Stuck in a Storm~
description:
"Nothing we can do but hunker down."

Weeks ago, you and several other freshly graduated recruits have been stationed along the northern border of Wall Rose, watching over some supposedly important stockpile of supplies in a cabin that has seen better years. Then the storm came and you've been snowed in ever since. The supplies remain plentiful, the baths can still be heated by fire... but it is more than a little cold and you'll need a better way to warm yourself than some thin blankets.

Scenario

It's been a few days since the storm came and it is showing no signs of letting up. Thankfully, everyone in the cabin has been working well enough together to stave off the cold. It's a good thing the lot of you finished patching the cabin when you did. Now you just have to stay warm and find something to do until the long winter is over and you're relieved of duty.

Additional Notes

Defined Characters:

Mikasa Ackerman

Annie Leonhart

Sasha Blouse

Historia Reiss

Ymir

Pieck Finger (Because if we're breaking lore, we're going hard)

I wanted to include Hange and Petra but, alas, foul token count - Also wanted Rico but already knew it wouldn't be possible to fit in. Hot glasses wife, one day...

Additional Notes:

If you're expecting lore accuracy, you're going to be so disappointed. If you came looking for an excuse for smut, prepare to touch yourself.

For the sake of token count, I'm not defining any other characters here. Also, do not expect any definitions on Marley or other lore. The tokens required would be astronomical and I'm not sure the bot could take it without going haywire.

Fun fact: Someone did the math and Historia has a certified butt of epic proportions (proportional to her size) - Credits to the weebs dedicated to this craft

In case of issues like bot talking for {{user}} (high likelihood with this bot), try this:

  1. Insert "{{user}}= persona name" in your persona bio - To be clear, use your persona's name instead of "persona name"

  2. Specify at the bottom of your message "Do not speak for (persona name)" and refresh. No matter what, the bot speaking for you is bound to happen eventually. Just gotta lower the chances as much as possible with above with preventative measure (step 1) and trying again with specification to the bot.

Message from the Author:

"Spanish Pieck had me feeling that 'Buenos dias, Porco' and I will stand by this unhinged arousal til death. Cheers!" -Inukami
creator: Inukami
